race.comment: SMOTHER (6) is still chasing his second win but continues to race well and doesn't need to improve much to break through here. He draws ideally for Pannell and should be right in the thick of things when they quicken. LOMAX (4) produced a breathtaking first-up win here before failing to fire to the same level last start. He returns to his preferred venue and reunites with Rawiller. Underestimate at your own peril. HEAD OF THE HERD (1) is impossible to fault chasing a hat-trick after strong wins over the mile at his past two starts. The rise to 1800m shouldn't trouble him. JOVIALE (3) also has to contend with a tricky gate but has the ability to feature if things fall into place.
